name: openclaw-insight
description: Usage analytics and improvement insights for OpenClaw — analyze your AI assistant habits and get actionable recommendations

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = 'dist/index.js'; let content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'); if (!content.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node')) { content = '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + content; } fs.writeFileSync(file, content);"
